title: Audit Laudos.AI 120-case score deductions
description: Decompose every failed/deducting score in the Laudos.AI 120-case run and classify whether each deduction is clinical/safety/fidelity/contract/guideline/operational versus purely aesthetic. Aesthetic-only penalties should be treated as benchmark bugs.
close_reason: Audited all Laudos.AI 120-case deductions, fixed evaluator false positives/aesthetic-only scoring, generated local before/after audit artifacts, and updated public aggregate leaderboard to calibrated 90.0% score.

title: Fix site regression and run 120-report model benchmark
description: Fix duplicate Methods/navigation and desktop layout regressions, validate site in browser, run 120 Laudos.AI reports, and benchmark top 5 free/open-source non-Anthropic/non-GPT models with rate-limit-safe throttling.
notes: Public-safe scrub complete: removed private/case-level artifacts from Git index, redacted public demo cases to input-only, updated pt-BR suite to aggregate-only, fixed 120-case leaderboard copy/layout, and verified critical failures hard-gate cases. Gates passed: npm test, npm run typecheck, npm run guard:public, npm run smoke:mock.

title: Complete free/open model matrix after public-safe release
description: Resume the 5-model OpenRouter free/open benchmark only after public-safe release is pushed. Current completed artifact: Poolside Laguna M.1 120-case run at 74.3% clinical; Nex-N2-Pro partial was stopped and should not be treated as final. Keep concurrency=1 and avoid rate limits.
